title: Intra prediction fusion with inherited cross-component models
abstract: A video coder specifies a cross-component prediction mode for a current block of a current picture of a video. The video coder derives a current cross-component model according to the specified cross-component mode for the current block. The video coder identifies a list of cross-component model candidates for the current block. The video coder selects a cross-component model candidate from the list of candidate cross-component models. The video coder generates a combined prediction based on the derived cross-component model and the selected cross-component model. The video coder encodes or decodes the current block by using the generated combined prediction. The video coder may signal a first syntax element indicating the specified cross-component prediction mode and a second syntax element indicating whether to use the combined prediction to encode the current block, with the first syntax element signaled before the second syntax element.
claims:
